title: Formatting a List of Items
scenario: A user wants to format a list of items in a neat and tidy format. The target output should be a formatted string that displays the list of items with proper spacing and formatting. The output should not contain any unnecessary characters.
constraints: Must format the list in a neat and tidy format
Must not contain any unnecessary characters

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output adheres to the constraints (proper formatting and removal of unnecessary characters)
Check if the output is well-formatted and easy to read
Check if the output contains the correct list of items
